BBVA states that for 2024, estimates are used for data not available at the closing date of the report, and prior-year estimates were replaced with actual consumption when available.
estimate_basis_zh: BBVA 明确说明，对截至报告编制日尚不可得的 2024 年数据使用估算值，并在取得实际消费数据后对上年估算值进行替换。

estimate_basis_en: BBVA states that Scope 2 location-based emissions are calculated by multiplying electricity consumption in each geography by the grid-mix emission factor for each country, using IEA factors through an external provider.
estimate_basis_zh: BBVA 明确说明，范围2位置法按照各地区用电量乘以所在国家电网电力结构排放因子计算，并通过外部服务商采用 IEA 因子。

calculation_method_zh: 供应商特定数据与行业平均因子
estimate_basis_en: For Scope 3 categories 3.1 and 3.2, BBVA uses supplier-specific emission factors when suppliers disclose full emissions and falls back to CEDA factors by spend category and geography when supplier-specific data are unavailable.
estimate_basis_zh: 对于范围3中的3.1和3.2类，BBVA 在供应商完整披露排放时采用供应商特定因子，在缺少该类数据时则按支出类别和地理位置回退使用 CEDA 因子。
